portrait.author: It is difficult to trace the history of the image to a single author, as various versions of this image (or others from the same photo-session) appear to have been distributed numerous times by numerous publicity agencies.  However, the earliest record of distribution of an alternate image from the same photo-session appears to have been by Bill Doll & Company for Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer (see bottom image of original upload)

No specific information provided with regards to an original photographer/distributor, however, earliest attached 1953 press-release promotes the subject's upcoming project on the ABC Television Network.
